title: Decision Crease Card
prompt:
Create a production-ready Decision Crease Card using TypeScript React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. This original card summarizes a proposal and opens a concise rationale below a visible horizontal crease. A reader activates Show rationale to unfold the lower area, which contains two evidence bullets and a close control. Use a light Bento composition: #F4F5F6 stage, white card, #ECECEE border, 22px corners, a gentle neutral shadow, #111111 type, and #4A4A4F secondary copy. Use cobalt as the only bright accent. Do not use gradients on the card.

Use semantic section content, native buttons, aria-expanded, aria-controls, and a polite status message that announces whether rationale is open. Every control needs a minimum 44px hit target, visible 3px focus ring, and native Enter and Space support. Animate the lower region with opacity and a spring around stiffness 300 and damping 30, while the crease indicator rotates in 180ms ease-out. Keep all state local and deterministic; do not use timers, random data, storage, remote assets, or network requests.

Keep the summary and controls readable at 320px, with evidence stacking vertically, and allow the layout to use more space in a detail preview. Preserve logical tab order, AA contrast, and text labels in addition to the visual crease. Under prefers-reduced-motion, reveal the region immediately with only a 120ms opacity fade. Return complete paste-ready client code plus a runnable pure CSS approximation and suggested HTML.

code.css:
/* HTML:
Evidence
*/ .decision-crease{max-width:340px;padding:20px;border:1px solid #ececee;border-radius:22px;background:#fff}.decision-crease button{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;min-height:44px;width:100%;margin-top:16px;padding-top:12px;border:0;border-top:1px solid #ececee;background:#fff;color:#111;font-weight:800}.decision-crease button:focus-visible{outline:3px solid #111;outline-offset:3px}.decision-crease button[aria-expanded=true]+div{display:block;color:#4a4a4f}@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.decision-crease *{transition:none}}
